NTRTN_NONE_NOT_RSDNT_CD K0520Z2 Nutritional Approaches (Non-res): None CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident performed none of the listed nutritional approaches while not a resident of the facility and within the last seven days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
